pi_items.source: Code analysis of scripts/seed_demodb.py - confirmed 2 hotels with Type='Boutique': Hotel Artemide (line 227) and Baglioni Hotel Luna (line 240)
Task description in task.json states: 'Change their Type to "Luxury Collection"'
Task description in task.json states: 'The luxury hospitality group "The Collections" has acquired all hotels of Type "Boutique"' and 'Create a Brand vertex with Name = "The Collections"'
Task description in task.json explicitly states: 'Append " - The Collections" to their Name (e.g., "Hotel Name" becomes "Hotel Name - The Collections")'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic DemoDB database seeded with 15 realistic hotels. Two hotels have Type='Boutique': Hotel Artemide (Rome, Italy) and Baglioni Hotel Luna (Venice, Italy). The task requires converting these Boutique hotels to 'Luxury Collection' type with the suffix ' - The Collections' appended to their names. All metadata values (target_original_type='Boutique', target_new_type='Luxury Collection', brand_name='The Collections', suffix=' - The Collections') are verified as accurate and consistent with the task requirements.
